overall.description: Aerial footage from a video game showing an eagle flying over ancient Alexandria during sunset. The camera follows the bird as it soars above the harbor, palace complexes, and city rooftops, transitioning from warm golden hour to deep blue night with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor with lighthouse and docked ships

events.description: eagle banks slightly left toward the harbor entrance
sunset colors deepen to vibrant orange and pink hues

agents.ego_description: eagle soaring over the harbor, scanning the water and ships below with wings spread wide

entered.detail: tall stone lighthouse with fire beacon at top, iconic landmark overlooking the harbor
busy port with stone quays and multiple docked vessels
ancient wooden warships with sails and oars moored at the docks
stone buildings with terracotta roofs lining the harbor edge

segments.scene_description: The eagle soars high above the ancient harbor of Alexandria during a vibrant sunset. The Lighthouse of Alexandria stands prominently on the left while trireme ships are docked in the calm waters below. The warm golden light bathes the stone buildings in orange and pink hues as the bird glides forward.

events.description: full moon becomes visible against the purple-blue twilight sky
approaching the palace complex walls and formal gardens

agents.ego_description: eagle gliding over the open water toward the palace complex, wings steady as it gains altitude

entered.detail: tall fortified stone walls surrounding the royal palace complex
formal gardens with manicured trees and marble pathways
bright full moon rising in the eastern sky against darkening clouds

segments.scene_description: Flying over the open water toward the palace district, the sky transitions from warm orange to deep purple and blue. The full moon becomes visible against the darkening clouds as the palace walls and formal gardens come into view on the right. The harbor and lighthouse fade into the distance behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: royal palace complex with gardens and courtyards

events.description: eagle banks sharply left around a palace tower
exiting palace complex toward the open city rooftops

agents.ego_description: eagle circling the palace complex, flying low over walls and gardens while maneuvering between structures

entered.detail: classical white marble statues of robed figures standing in the palace courtyard
tall dark green cypress trees lining the garden paths and courtyards
red clay tiled roofs of the palace buildings and surrounding structures

segments.scene_description: The eagle banks around the palace complex, flying low over stone walls and manicured gardens filled with cypress trees. Marble statues stand in the courtyards below as the terracotta rooftops of the palace buildings pass beneath. The lighting shifts to blue hour, casting a cool tone over the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: city rooftops and coastal district at night

events.description: sky darkens significantly to deep blue, artificial lights visible in building windows
turning back toward the harbor, lighthouse beacon reappears in the distance

agents.ego_description: eagle flying over the city rooftops at dusk, returning toward the harbor with steady wing beats

entered.detail: dark silhouette of mountains visible on the horizon against the twilight sky
lighthouse beacon visible again in the distance, guiding ships to harbor

segments.scene_description: Flying over the city rooftops at dusk, the sky darkens to deep blue and the first artificial lights become visible in windows. The eagle turns back toward the harbor, with the lighthouse beacon reappearing in the distance. The landscape transitions from urban palace to coastal city as night falls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide over ancient Alexandria as a vibrant sunset fades into a moonlit night. It begins high above the harbor, where the Lighthouse of Alexandria stands prominently beside trireme ships docked in calm waters bathed in orange and pink hues. As the eagle glides forward over the open water, the warm golden light shifts toward deep purple and blue, causing the harbor and lighthouse to fade into the distance. The scene then expands toward the palace district, where the full moon emerges against darkening clouds just as the palace walls and formal gardens come into view on the right.

The shot follows a continuous aerial path that transitions from a low glide over royal palace grounds into a high-altitude sweep over a darkening coastal city. It begins with the eagle banking around a palace complex, soaring low over stone walls, manicured cypress gardens, and marble statues beneath terracotta rooftops. As the camera moves, the warm light of dusk shifts into the cool tones of the blue hour, casting a soft shadow over the architecture. The scene then expands across the city rooftops as the sky deepens to a dark blue and artificial lights begin to flicker in the windows below. Finally, the eagle turns back toward the harbor, shifting the perspective from the urban center toward the distant, glowing beacon of the lighthouse as night fully falls.
